zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Knightley於1315年出生在英國斯塔福爾格諾薩爾時，他的父親Roger Knightley I24歲，母親Sybil11歲。他於1324年之前與Juliana在英國斯塔福爾格諾薩爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1395年在他的家鄉享年80歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾斯塔福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Knightley于1315年出生在英国斯塔福爾格諾薩爾时，他的父亲Roger Knightley I24岁，母亲Sybil11岁。他于1324年之前与Juliana在英国斯塔福爾格諾薩爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1395年在他的家乡享年80岁，埋葬在英国英格兰斯塔福爾斯塔福德。

nameMeanings.name: Knightley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Knightly
meanings: English (Middlesex and Cambridgeshire): variant of Knightley, a habitational name from Knightley in Gnosall (Staffordshire). The placename derives from Old English cniht ‘knight, young man, retainer’ (genitive plural cnihta) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This is the usual spelling of the name in Ireland, where it has been establishes since the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Knightley was born in 1315, in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England, his father, Roger Knightley I, was 24 and his mother, Sybil, was 11. He married Juliana before 1324, in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1395, in his hometown, at the age of 80, and was buried in Stafford, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Knightley est né en 1315, à Gnosall, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Roger Knightley I, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Sybil, avait 11 ans. Il a épousé Juliana avant 1324, à Gnosall, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1395, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterré à Stafford, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Knightley 1315 in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Knightley I 24 und seine Mutter Sybil 11. Er hat vor 1324 in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England Juliana geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1395 im Alter von 80 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Stafford, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Knightley è nato il nel 1315 nel Gnosall, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Roger Knightley I, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Sybil, aveva 11 anni. Lui sposato Juliana prima del 1324, nel Gnosall, Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1395, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolto a Stafford, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Knightleyが1315年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアグノサルで生まれた時，父Roger Knightley Iは24歳，母Sybilは11歳であった。1324年以前にイギリススタフォードシュアイアグノサルでJulianaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1395年に故郷で80歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアスタフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Knightley(이)가 1315년 영국 스태퍼드실르 뇰사에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Knightley I(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Sybil(은)는 11세였다. 그는 1324년 이전 영국 스태퍼드실르 뇰사에서 Juliana(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1395년 그의 고향에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Knightley nasceu em 1315, em Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Knightley I, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Sybil, tinha 11 anos. Ele casou-se com Juliana antes 1324, em Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1395, em sua cidade natal, com 80 anos, e foi sepultado em Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Knightley родился в 1315 г. в местности гносалл, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger Knightley I было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Sybil, 11. Он женился на женщине по имени Juliana перед 1324 г. в местности гносалл, стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1395 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 80 лет и был похоронен в местности стаффорд, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Knightley nació en 1315, en Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger Knightley I, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Sybil, tenía 11 años. Se casó con Juliana antes de 1324, en Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1395, en su pueblo, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultado en Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
